title: Squirrel Task
description: Normalized task object for Squirrel intake. Submitted by vOS or OpenClaw into .squirrel/inbox/.

title.description: Short imperative description of the task.

objective.description: One-sentence statement of what must be accomplished.

owner.description: Who submitted the task. 'user' for vOS, 'openclaw' for scheduled tasks.

status.description: Intake status is always 'queued'. Squirrel manages transitions after intake.

constraints.description: What the execution lane must NOT do.

success_criteria.description: Binary conditions that must be true for the task to pass validation.

context_files.description: Exact file paths the execution lane needs. No globs.
